Indeed, we can use the following Lean lemma:
`Set.range (f ∘ g) = f '' Set.range g`.

Because:

Thus `y ∈ f '' Set.range g`.

           have h₁ : Function.Bijective (⇑(c_v_alg V v).toEquiv) := (c_v_alg V v).bijective
           have h₂ : Set.BijOn (⇑(c_v_alg V v).toEquiv) Set.univ Set.univ := by
             exact Set.bijective_iff_bijOn_univ.mp h₁
           simp_all [Set.BijOn]
           <;>
           aesop
         }) <;>
       (try
         {
           simp_all [Set.BijOn]
           <;>
           aesop
         })
